overview: An AI-powered real-time railway passenger monitoring system for administrators to track coach occupancy, manage overcrowding alerts, and generate AI safety reports via Google Gemini.
features: Internet Identity login with secure session management
Live train & coach dashboard with 6-coach occupancy tracking
Overcrowding alerts with severity levels and one-click resolution
Simulated CCTV feed with YOLO detection overlay
AI report generation via Google Gemini API
Reports management page with history and download
